problem id: 4e5df314
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND SHL(7)) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01011010 -> 00101101
  00001010 -> 00000101
  10110010 -> 01011001
  01100101 -> 10110010
  10101110 -> 01010111
  11110101 -> 11111010
  00011011 -> 00001101
  01101000 -> 00110100
  11111111 -> 11111111

query: 01000100
predicted answer: 00100010
